news.summary: Qatar is expelling Iran’s military and security attaches after Iranian missiles caused “extensive damage” to Ras Laffan.

news.headline: Senior Special Warfare Leaders Highlight Community's Capabilities, Define Its Challenges
news.summary: Two top U.S. special operations leaders testified at a House Armed Services Committee hearing on Capitol Hill about the current special operations forces' strengths and future challenges.

news.headline: Funerals held for Afghans killed in Pakistani strike on Kabul hospital
news.summary: Afghans are burying the victims from a Pakistani air strike on a drug rehabilitation centre in Kabul.

news.headline: At least eight killed as Brazilian police carry out lethal favela raid
news.summary: Brazilian police say that raid in Rio de Janeiro targeted a leader of Red Command, a powerful criminal group.

news.headline: India's young are more educated than ever. So why are so many jobless?
news.summary: India’s educational enrolment has surged but jobs, especially good ones, are not keeping pace, a new report finds.

news.headline: Labubu film is official with Paddington director at the helm
news.summary: The film will combine live action and computer-generated animation and is in "early development".

news.headline: Russian hypersonic jets buzz Japan’s coast in ‘thinly veiled threat’
news.summary: Russia’s defence ministry has released footage of its fighter jets carrying Kinzhal hypersonic missiles conducting exercises over the Sea of Japan, or East Sea, with the move interpreted as a message to Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi ahead of her talks with US President Donald Trump in Washi
